content.text: Sheet: Sheet1 ================================================== Section                            Question                                                                                                                                                           Answer About LabelSmart                 What is LabelSmart? AI-powered software that checks pharmaceutical packaging artworks and leaflets against approved references, regulations, and internal standards before printing. Who is it for?                                                                                                  Artwork & Packaging Managers, QA Teams, and Regulatory Affairs. What problem does it solve?                                                                      Automates label comparison to reduce manual effort and prevent labeling errors and recalls. How it works                    How do I use it?                                Upload artwork/leaflet and compare against an approved reference. AI highlights text, font, logo, symbol, and layout differences. What file types are supported?                                                                Artwork: JPG, JPEG, PNG, GIF, JFIF, PDF, CDR, PSD, EPS. Leaflets: JPG, PNG, JFIF, PDF, DOC, DOCX. Can it compare multi-page leaflets?                                                                                       Yes, both single artwork images and multi-page leaflet PDFs are supported. What happens after comparison?                                                            Results show matched rules, detected differences, annotated comparison, and downloadable PDF reports. Is review still required?                                                                                     Yes. AI assists the review, but authorized reviewers perform final approval. Accuracy and trust            Is the AI 100% accurate?                                                                                 No. It assists reviewers and should not replace final regulatory or QA approval. Does it keep an audit trail?                                                                                                              Yes. Audit logs and version history are maintained. Access and permissions           Can access be role-based?                                                                                                 Yes. Admin, reviewer, and external reviewer roles are supported. Getting started             Can I sign up directly?                                                                                               No. Access is provided after a demo and sales-assisted onboarding. Is there a free trial?                                                                                                                               No public free trial is available. Pricing and billing                   How is it priced?                                                                                                             Subscription model with credit-based usage tracking. Can I cancel or get a refund?                                                                                                     Cancellation is allowed; refunds are evaluated case by case. Is anything shipped physically?                                                                                                                                 No. The platform is cloud-based. Data and privacy                  Is my data secure?                                                      Customer data is protected and not sold; request detailed security information during evaluation if needed. Support                   Who do I contact?                                                                              Ai4Pharma Tech Limited, Ahmedabad. Phone: +91 99092 00002, Email: info@ai4pharma.ai
